source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 시험소/06. Usability 보완_250103/03. 제품 매뉴얼/User Manual_250107.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: User manual for H&abyz B Series wireless digital flat panel detector models, including intended use, specifications, installation, operation, maintenance, EMC, labeling, warranty, and revision history.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports setup, operation, maintenance, disposal, and regulatory/EMC use instructions for B Series detector users.
keyPoints: B Series detectors are digital flat panel detectors used for screening and diagnosis of disease or injury.
The detectors are not intended for mammography applications.
Only a physician or legally certified operator should use the product.
The equipment complies with IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standards for medical devices.
Revision history lists version 0.0 dated 2024-07-22 as the initial release.

entities.name: H&abyz
entities.evidence: This user manual explains how to use the B Series detector models made by H&abyz.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: H&abyz Co., Ltd. follows the contract with each customer regarding the product warranty period.

entities.name: B Series
entities.evidence: B Series are digital flat panel detectors that is used for screening and diagnosis of disease of injury.

concepts.name: Intended use
concepts.evidence: B Series are digital flat panel detectors that is used for screening and diagnosis of disease of injury.

concepts.name: Contraindication
concepts.evidence: These detectors are not intended to be used for mammography applications.

concepts.name: Qualified operator requirement
concepts.evidence: Only a physician or a legally certified operator should use this product.

concepts.name: Electrical safety classification
concepts.pageTarget: B Series detector electrical safety classification
concepts.evidence: Type of protection against electrical shock: Class l or Internal powered ME equipment Degree of protection against electrical shock: Class B applied part

concepts.name: EMC compliance
concepts.evidence: This equipment complies with IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standards for medical devices.

concepts.name: WEEE disposal
concepts.evidence: This symbol indicates that this product is not to be disposed with your household waste, according to the WEEE Directive (2012/19/EC) and your national law.

concepts.name: Product lifetime
concepts.evidence: The estimated product lifetime may be up to five (5) years under the appropriate regular inspection and maintenance.

evidence.claim: The manual covers B Series detector models made by H&abyz.
evidence.evidenceText: This user manual explains how to use the B Series detector models made by H&abyz.

evidence.claim: The B Series detectors are intended for diagnostic radiographic exposures of multiple body parts on adult subjects by qualified or trained users.
evidence.evidenceText: These detectors are intended for use by a qualified/trained doctor or technician on both adult subjects for taking diagnostic radiographic exposures of the skull, spinal column, chest, abdomen, extremities, and other body parts.

evidence.claim: The B Series patient group includes adults, children, and infants, with radiography reviewed by the doctor in charge before examination.
evidence.evidenceText: It is intended for general patients such as adults, children, and infants, but all radiography should be reviewed by a doctor in charge prior to beginning the examination.

evidence.claim: The detectors are not intended for mammography applications.
evidence.evidenceText: These detectors are not intended to be used for mammography applications.

evidence.claim: The product is identified as a medical device.
evidence.pageTarget: B Series detector medical device status

evidence.claim: Only a physician or legally certified operator should use the product.
evidence.evidenceText: Only a physician or a legally certified operator should use this product.

evidence.claim: Radiography, image processing, image reading, and image data storage must follow the laws of the country or region of use.
evidence.evidenceText: Roentgenography, image processing, image reading, and image data storage must be performed in accordance with the laws of the country or region in which the product is being used.
evidence.pageTarget: B Series detector legal use requirements

evidence.claim: In the European Union and EEA, the product must not be disposed with household waste under the WEEE Directive 2012/19/EC and national law.
evidence.evidenceText: European Union (and EEA*) only This symbol indicates that this product is not to be disposed with your household waste, according to the WEEE Directive (2012/19/EC) and your national law.

evidence.claim: The detector model list in specifications includes B1417MCW, FB1417MCW, B1717MCW, and FB1717MCW.
The B Series detectors use a CsI scintillator.
The B Series detectors support IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac wireless communication.
evidence.evidenceText: B Series detectors support IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac to acquire images without a wired connection in anytime, anywhere.

evidence.claim: Wireless communication frequency ranges are specified for EU, FCC, MIC, and KC jurisdictions.
evidence.evidenceText: Frequency range EU: 2.4 GHz to 2.483 GHz (13 Channels) FCC: 2.4 GHz to 2.473 GHz (11 Channels) MIC: 2.4 GHz to 2.495 GHz (4 Channels) KC: 2.4 GHz to 2.483 GHz (13 Channels)
evidence.pageTarget: B Series detector wireless frequency ranges

evidence.claim: The wireless communication specifications are the same for B1417MCW, B1717MCW, FB1417MCW, and FB1717MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: The wireless communication specifications of the B Series detectors (B1417MCW, B1717MCW, FB1417MCW, FB1717MCW) are the same.

evidence.claim: The operating environment specifications are the same for B1417MCW, B1717MCW, FB1417MCW, and FB1717MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: The operating environment specifications of B Series detectors (B1417MCW, B1717MCW, FB1417MCW, FB1717MCW) are the same.

evidence.claim: The estimated product lifetime may be up to five years with appropriate regular inspection and maintenance.
evidence.evidenceText: The estimated product lifetime may be up to five (5) years under the appropriate regular inspection and maintenance.

evidence.claim: Regular inspection should be performed at least once a year.
evidence.evidenceText: be sure to perform regular inspection at least once a year.

evidence.claim: The equipment complies with IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standards for medical devices.
evidence.evidenceText: This equipment complies with IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standards for medical devices.

evidence.claim: The Wireless Detector is classified as CISPR 11 Group 1 and Class A for RF emissions.
evidence.evidenceText: RF Emissions CISPR 11 Group 1 RF Emissions CISPR 11 Class A

evidence.claim: The user manual revision history lists version 0.0 dated 2024-07-22 as the initial release.
evidence.pageTarget: B Series detector user manual revision history

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the source text does not mention FDA; authority evidence in the text is limited to EU/EEA, FCC, MIC, KC, WEEE, IEC, ISO, IEEE, and CISPR references.
Document title is inferred from the file path and manual wording because no explicit cover-page title is present in the provided text.
Possible OCR or source quality issues appear in technical terms and labels, including 'Amorpulse Silicone', 'Csl' versus CsI, '820.11ac', and 'B177 Series Detector Label'.
Battery model evidence conflicts between 'MBP-3S1P3330-HAZ' and accessory text 'MBP-3S1P33330-HAZ'.
Manufacturer address and formal regulatory clearance or submission status are not present in the provided source text.
